title: Item-quality eval (single-correct, distractor plausibility, readability, bias scan) + defect report
context: Beyond hard schema validation, an item-quality eval checks distractor plausibility, readability, and basic bias/sensitivity, with an LLM-judge pass that flags for human review and never auto-publishes. Defects are reported per release and resolved before ship.
objective: Build the item-quality eval (single-correct, distractor plausibility, readability, bias scan) with an advisory LLM-judge pass and a per-release defect report.
acceptanceCriteria: Automated checks confirm exactly one correct answer (static), plausible non-overlapping distractors, reading level within target, and a basic bias/sensitivity scan; an LLM-judge pass flags for human review, never auto-publishes
Defects reported per release and resolved before ship
